driver_insight: Rohini's human apparent temperature of 43.2°C is primarily driven by high building density (NDBI 0.53), low vegetation cover (NDVI 0.16), low-albedo surface materials (albedo 0.14), extreme ambient temperature (44.1°C). Based on our dual AIML modeling, the city's heat dynamics are captured with high accuracy (Linear R² = 1.0, Random Forest R² = 0.998). In this city, every 0.1 increase in NDVI is associated with a 2.80°C change in LST.
